channel.title: Vibe on sytranvn.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Vibe on sytranvn.dev

item.title: Vibe Writer
item.description: I have seen significant more posts on social networks like Facebook, LinkedIn written by AI. At the surface, they look charming, precise and detailed. But if we ask the authors without peaking at what they have posted, and tell what each thesis statement in it, we might be left hanging. Sometimes, the statements are short, we can keep asking them to elaborate with supporting arguments. They probably won’t tell us. No one read what AI wrote.
